resultList.dtldesc: A stunning 3 bhk flat is now available for sale in the prime location of Banashankari Stage 2 Bangalore presenting an unparalleled opportunity to own a residence where comfort convenience and elegance converge seamlessly.Property Specifications This newly constructed residence offers a spacious carpet area of 1700 sqft providing ample space for comfortable living. Situated on the second floor of a fivestorey building this unfurnished flat is a blank canvas waiting for your personal touch. Boasting three bedrooms and three bathrooms including two attached and one common all with modern Western fittings and geyser points this flat ensures convenience and comfort for its residents. Two balconies one attached to the master bedroom and  other to the hall overlooking the main road and garden offer refreshing outdoor spaces to relax and unwind. The living cum dining area is perfect for hosting gatherings and spending quality time with loved ones. Additionally this flat features a separate puja roomstore room providing flexibility for your spiritual or storage needs. The normal kitchen is equipped with a platform and sink along with a piped gas connection and utility area.  The flooring is elegantly done in marble adding a touch of luxury to the interiors. For those who believe in the harmonious flow of Vaastu this flat is compliant and faces the auspicious East direction.Facilities Covered parking ensures the safety of your vehicle while reliable water supply from both borewell and corporation sources coupled with 100 power backup adds to the comfort of living. Security is paramount with a security guard and CCTV cameras installed throughout the premises. With ten lifts in the building convenience is at your fingertips.Locality In terms of locality the flat is conveniently located near the Bhan BDA complex with schools hospitals malls and supermarkets all within a 1 km radius. Banks and ATMs are also easily accessible ensuring banking convenience at your doorstep. Public transport options are abundant with both railway and metro stations conveniently located within 8 km and 1 km respectively.
